scope_limitation: Results apply only to infrastructure, platform, and developer-tooling repositories. They must not be generalized to all repository types.

corpora.selected_files: Existing Phase 18 synthetic enterprise monolith fixture.
corpora.excluded_areas: No additional areas excluded in Phase 18.5.
corpora.rationale: Retained as the controlled baseline corpus from Phase 18.

corpora.selected_files: CLI command assembly, action package, chart loading/downloading, repository metadata, Kubernetes client, release storage, storage drivers, release types, and registry utilities.
corpora.excluded_areas: vendor, generated code, large testdata, plugin implementation details, search UI helpers, unrelated documentation, and broad package tests.
corpora.rationale: Helm is a mature Go developer tool with command-to-action layering, release lifecycle behavior, storage abstraction, repository metadata, and Kubernetes integration.

corpora.selected_files: Collector startup, command/config provider flow, service startup, pipeline config, extensions lifecycle, telemetry, component contracts, confmap, OTLP receiver/exporter, batch processor, memory limiter, and internal graph/status helpers.
corpora.excluded_areas: vendor, generated code-heavy pdata packages, large testdata, broad test suites, connector variants, most helper packages, and unrelated documentation.
corpora.rationale: OpenTelemetry Collector is a modular infrastructure repository with component factories, pipeline assembly, runtime lifecycle, and telemetry concerns.
